zh.lifeSummary: 當John Littlefield於1624年11月1日出生在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德時，他的父親Edmund Littlefield32歲，母親Annis Austin28歲。他於大約1650年與Patience Wakefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1653年住在美國緬因州約克。他去世於1697年2月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年72歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Littlefield于1624年11月1日出生在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德时，他的父亲Edmund Littlefield32岁，母亲Annis Austin28岁。他于大约1650年与Patience Wakefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1653年住在美国缅因州約克。他去世于1697年2月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年72岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1642:  Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1653: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Littlefield was born on 1 November 1624, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, his father, Edmund Littlefield, was 32 and his mother, Annis Austin, was 28. He married Patience Wakefield about 1650, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in York, Maine, United States in 1653. He died on 9 February 1697, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Littlefield est né le 1 novembre 1624, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Littlefield, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Annis Austin, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Patience Wakefield environ 1650, à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à York, Maine, États-Unis en 1653. Il est décédé le 9 février 1697, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Littlefield am 1. November 1624 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Littlefield 32 und seine Mutter Annis Austin 28. Er hat um 1650 in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America Patience Wakefield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1653 hat er in York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 9. Februar 1697 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Province of Maine, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Littlefield è nato il il 1 novembre 1624 nel Titchfield, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Littlefield, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Annis Austin, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Patience Wakefield circa 1650, nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1653. Morì il 9 febbraio 1697, nel Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

ja.Province of Maine, British Colonial Amer: イギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メイン
ja.lifeSummary: John Littlefieldが1624年11月1日にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで生まれた時，父Edmund Littlefieldは32歳，母Annis Austinは28歳であった。約1650年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークでPatience Wakefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1653年にはアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークに住んでいた。彼は1697年2月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズで72歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインにて埋葬された。

ko.Province of Maine, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹
ko.lifeSummary: John Littlefield(이)가 1624년 11월 1일 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Littlefield(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Annis Austin(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1650년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 Patience Wakefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1653년도에 미국 메인 주 요르크에서 살았다. 그는 1697년 2월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Littlefield nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1624, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Littlefield, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Annis Austin, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Patience Wakefield aproximadamente 1650, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América em 1653. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1697, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Littlefield родился 1 ноября 1624 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Littlefield было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Annis Austin, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Patience Wakefield около 1650 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в 1653 году. Он умер 9 февраля 1697 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Littlefield nació el 1 de noviembre de 1624, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Littlefield, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Annis Austin, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Patience Wakefield aproximadamente 1650, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Vivió en York, Maine, Estados Unidos en 1653. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1697, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Province of Maine, British Colonial America.
